summary: Frontend-only testing for cinematic page transitions + WhatsApp FAB swap. All target features verified working via Playwright + visual inspection of mid-transition screenshot.

issues: Center 'SERVICES' flash text overlaps with the AI Content Creator card title ('AI Content Creator') making it momentarily unreadable on services route. Visually it's a stylistic choice but slightly hides middle content during ~600-1000ms. Acceptable since transition is brief.

critical_code_review_comments: CinematicTransition.jsx: transition fires on initial mount too (initial render of '/'), which is desired and confirmed working.
Layout.jsx: motion.main has delay:0.2 with duration 0.75 + initial blur(8px). This stacks well with the 1.5s cinematic overlay - content reveals as bars retract. Good.

WhatsAppFab.jsx: href uses hardcoded number 6281288880000 (placeholder). User should verify this is the real number before production. Anchor opens correctly to wa.me which redirects to api.whatsapp.com web client with prefilled text - verified.
App.js: ChatWidget fully removed, WhatsAppFab mounted outside AnimatedRoutes so it persists across navigation - good.
Accessibility: WA FAB has aria-label='Chat via WhatsApp' - good. Cinematic overlay has pointer-events-none so it doesn't block clicks - good.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cinematic transition + WhatsApp FAB swap fully verified. Visual screenshot at .screenshots/transition_mid.png confirms cinemascope bars, REC indicator, scene labels, flying camera drone, viewfinder frame all render correctly during route changes. Contact form POST /api/contact still works (toast 'Terima kasih! Tim kami akan menghubungi Anda segera.' shown). chat-fab data-testid completely removed.

scene_labels_visually_confirmed: SERVICES (top-right + center flash visible in screenshot)
